---
title: " Análisis Bivariado"

---

# Categórico vs Cuantitativo

## Cargar dataset
```{python}
import altair as alt
from vega_datasets import data
import pandas as pd

movies_extended = data.movies().dropna(subset = ['Major_Genre'])
movies_extended.head()
```
# Comparando varias distribuciones
## Histograma income vs categorías
```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_bar().encode(
    x=alt.X("Worldwide_Gross", bin=alt.BinParams(maxbins=30)),
    y=alt.Y("count()"),
    color=alt.Color("Major_Genre"),
)
```
# Density plot
```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).transform_density(
    density="Worldwide_Gross",
    groupby=["Major_Genre"],
    as_=["Worldwide_Gross", "density"],
).mark_area(opacity=0.5).encode(
    x=alt.X("Worldwide_Gross:Q", title="Worldwide Gross"),
    y=alt.Y("density:Q", stack=None),
    color=alt.Color("Major_Genre:N"),
)
```

# Grafico de barras horizontales
```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_bar().encode(
    x=alt.X("mean(Worldwide_Gross)", title="Average Worldwide Gross"),
    y=alt.Y("Major_Genre"),
    color=alt.Color("Major_Genre"),
)
```
```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_tick().encode(
    x=alt.X("mean(Worldwide_Gross)", title="Average Worldwide Gross"),
    y=alt.Y("Major_Genre"),
    color=alt.Color("Major_Genre"),
    tooltip=alt.Tooltip("Title:N"),
).interactive()
```
## Heatmaps
```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_rect().encode(
    x=alt.X("Worldwide_Gross", bin=alt.BinParams(maxbins=30)),
    y=alt.Y("Major_Genre"),
    color=alt.Color("count()")
) 
```
## Boxplots
```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_boxplot().encode(
    x=alt.X("Worldwide_Gross"),
    y=alt.Y("Major_Genre")
).properties(width=500, height=400) 
```
```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_boxplot().encode(
    x=alt.X("Worldwide_Gross"), y=alt.Y("Major_Genre"), size=alt.Size("count()")
).properties(width=500, height=400)
```

# Cuantitativo vs Cuantitativo
## Scatterplot
```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_point().encode(
    y=alt.Y("Rotten_Tomatoes_Rating"),
    x=alt.X("IMDB_Rating"),
    color=alt.Color("Major_Genre"),
    tooltip=alt.Tooltip("Title:N"),
).interactive()
```

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_point().encode(
    x=alt.X("Production_Budget"),
    y=alt.Y("Worldwide_Gross"),
)
``` 

## Heatmaps
```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_rect().encode(
    x=alt.X("Production_Budget", bin=alt.BinParams(maxbins=100)),
    y=alt.Y("Worldwide_Gross", bin=alt.BinParams(maxbins=100)),
    color=alt.Color("count()")
)
``` 

# Categórico vs Categórico 

## Barcharts
```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_bar().encode(
    y=alt.Y("Major_Genre", sort="-x"),
    x=alt.X("count()"),
    color=alt.Color("Major_Genre"),
)
```
```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_bar().encode(
    y=alt.Y("Major_Genre", sort="-x"),
    x=alt.X("count()", stack="normalize", title="Proporción de películas"),
    color=alt.Color("MPAA_Rating:N"),
)
```
